response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no demonstrated experience with C programming in UNIX/embedded environments, no Linux kernel modification experience, no exposure to embedded networking security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X, and no Japanese language proficiency — all of which are non-negotiable for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven ability to build and maintain complex systems including embedded-like projects (e.g., Voice, DSW)
Active contributor to open-source tools and technical education (workshops, libraries)
concerns: No C programming experience in embedded or UNIX systems as required
No evidence of Linux kernel analysis, modification, or embedded networking security work
Japanese language proficiency is absent; only English, Romanian, and basic German are listed
